title: Bessent: US seized $1 billion in Iranian cryptocurrency — 'outright grabbed the wallets' at Reagan Forum
snippet: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent at 2026 Reagan National Economic Forum revealed US seized ~$1B in Iranian cryptocurrency under Operation Economic Fury. 'We outright grabbed the wallets.' Iran estimated stealing $400-500M/month via sanctions evasion. Builds on April 2026 freeze of $344M USDT on Tron blockchain. Targets oil sales, shadow banking, shipping, crypto channels.
tag_reason: 신규 — 미 재무장관의 이란 암호화폐 10억달러 압류 수치 최초 공개
